headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 11, 2026**
article:
The Cleveland Guardians secured a convincing 7-2 victory over the Los Angeles Angels, with Joey Cantillo pitching 6.0 strong innings, allowing 0 earned runs and striking out 4 batters. Travis Bazzana led the Angels' offense with 1 hit and 2 RBI. In other news, the Baltimore Orioles edged out the New York Yankees 3-2, securing a crucial win, while the Tampa Bay Rays took down the Toronto Blue Jays 8-5 behind Andrés Giménez's two home runs and five RBIs.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries, with Addison Barger of the Toronto Blue Jays placed on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow inflammation. Other players on the injured list include Eli White of the Atlanta Braves, Justin Verlander of the Detroit Tigers, Kerry Carpenter of the Detroit Tigers, Edwin Díaz of the Los Angeles Dodgers, Brock Stewart of the Los Angeles Dodgers, Logan Webb of the San Francisco Giants, and Brandon Lockridge of the Milwaukee Brewers.

The San Francisco Giants made a trade ahead of the MLB trade deadline, acquiring left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for catcher Patrick Bailey. The Baltimore Orioles also made a trade, acquiring right-handed pitchers Enyel Garcia and Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies for cash.

top_news.title: **Guardians Take Down Angels in 7-2 Rout**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured a convincing 7-2 victory over the Los Angeles Angels, with Joey Cantillo pitching 6.0 strong innings, allowing 0 earned runs and striking out 4 batters. Travis Bazzana led the Angels' offense with 1 hit and 2 RBI.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Yankees in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles edged out the New York Yankees 3-2, securing a crucial win. Coby Mayo led the Orioles' offense with a home run and three RBIs, while Ryan Weathers pitched 6.1 strong innings for the Yankees.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Blue Jays 8-5**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured an 8-5 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Andrés Giménez leading the charge at the plate. Giménez hit two home runs and drove in five runs, while Bryan Baker earned the save with a scoreless inning of relief.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Shut Out Rangers 1-0**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks secured a narrow 1-0 victory over the Texas Rangers, with Michael Soroka earning the win after pitching 6.1 innings with 5 strikeouts and no earned runs. Geraldo Perdomo led the Diamondbacks' offense with 2 hits, 1 RBI, and a crucial double that scored the game's only run.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays' Barger Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Addison Barger, right fielder for the Toronto Blue Jays, has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow inflammation, effective retroactive to May 10, 2026.

top_news.title: **Giants Make Pre-Deadline Trade**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants have made a trade ahead of the MLB trade deadline, acquiring left-handed pitcher Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians. Wilkinson joins the Giants in exchange for catcher Patrick Bailey.
